_comment: Single source of truth for OAuth primitives. Imported by BOTH src/config/oauth.ts (the browser TS client) and scripts/gen-oauth-metadata.js (the build-time static metadata emitter), so client_id / scope / redirect_uris cannot drift. Change the domain/scope here only. defaultBaseUrl is overridable at build time via EXPO_PUBLIC_OAUTH_BASE_URL.
scope: atproto account:email?action=manage identity:handle blob:*/* include:app.bsky.authFullApp?aud=* include:chat.bsky.authFullChatClient?aud=* include:community.lexicon.calendar.authFull include:site.standard.authFull
